title: Need formula results to have 2 decimal places
excerpt: Hello! We are using a board to track purchasing and when we purchase metal the cost per pound may be $0.552.  When the formula calculates out the total we need it to display in 2 decimal places as well as the sum at the …

posts.author: MPelter (Mandi Pelter)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! We are using a board to track purchasing and when we purchase metal the cost per pound may be $0.552. When the formula calculates out the total we need it to display in 2 decimal places as well as the sum at the bottom of the column. I am stumped on this one.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: Something like Round({number},2) should give you what you need.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
